political.s: FEC: $273K in executive political donations; partisan lean Democratic +21 across 13 executive donors.

labor.s: Via parent company Delta Air Lines: 628 federal penalties totaling $133.8M since 2000 (Violation Tracker).

charity.s: Via parent company Delta Air Lines: $35M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.06% of revenue) via Delta Air Lines Foundation. JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #38 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. Drucker Institute Management Top 250 — ranked #39 (2024) on customer satisfaction, employee engagement, innovation, social responsibility, and financial strength. Fortune World's Most Admired Companies — ranked #10 (2024). Newsweek Most Trustworthy Companies in America — ranked #13 (2024). Operates the Delta Air Lines Foundation: $12.4M in charitable contributions, gifts & grants paid (FY2023, IRS Form 990-PF).

environment.s: Via parent company Delta Air Lines: CDP Climate Change: A- (2024) — leadership-band environmental disclosure with validated targets.

dei.s: Via parent company Delta Air Lines: JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #38 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating. Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index member (2024) — transparent on female leadership, equal pay, inclusive culture.

execPay.s: Via parent company Delta Air Lines: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio 190:1 (median employee pay $100,976) — SEC proxy statement (DEF 14A, 2026).

governance.s: Wikidata: owned by S&P 500; HQ Atlanta. (Wikidata Q188920)

health.s: Via parent company Delta Air Lines: Delta Air Lines: DOT 2025 ATCR — 83.5% on-time arrivals, 1.84 complaints per 100K passengers, 5.8 mishandled bags per 1K. 1 DOT enforcement action. No fatal Part 121 accidents 2020-2025; multiple non-fatal runway/taxi incidents in NTSB database.
